churn_detection.reasoning: The patient provides a comprehensive overview of her history, current treatment, and future outlook without any indication of a cutoff.

biologic_status.name: Stelara
biologic_status.reasoning: The patient states, "Finally got approved for Stelara. Been on it two years."

age.evidence: My name is Caroline, I'm 37 years old

sex.evidence: I'm a single mom to two kids

years_with_crohns.evidence: been dealing with Crohn's disease for almost 15 years now.

treatment_journey.name: prednisone
treatment_journey.evidence: Started on prednisone and mesalamine right away. The prednisone was horrible - gained 30 pounds, couldn't sleep, mood swings that scared me. But it did calm the inflammation.

treatment_journey.name: mesalamine
treatment_journey.evidence: Tried to maintain on just mesalamine but within three months I was flaring again.

treatment_journey.name: azathioprine
treatment_journey.evidence: Added azathioprine. Worked for about a year until I developed severe joint pain. ... had to stop the medication.

treatment_journey.name: Remicade
treatment_journey.evidence: Started Remicade when I was 24. ... Then during my second pregnancy, it stopped working.

treatment_journey.name: Humira
treatment_journey.evidence: After delivery, started Humira. ... Humira worked for three years. ... When Humira failed, tried Cimzia.

treatment_journey.name: Cimzia
treatment_journey.evidence: When Humira failed, tried Cimzia. Insurance denied it three times.

treatment_journey.name: Stelara
treatment_journey.evidence: Finally got approved for Stelara. Been on it two years.

treatment_journey.name: methotrexate
treatment_journey.evidence: Doctor mentioned combination therapy next - adding methotrexate to Stelara.

pathway_endpoint.reasoning: Finally got approved for Stelara. Been on it two years.

referral_pathway.name: doctor
referral_pathway.evidence: When I finally saw a doctor, she said IBS and gave me fiber supplements.

referral_pathway.name: GI doctor
referral_pathway.evidence: After six months of increasing pain and weight loss, I demanded a referral to a specialist. The GI doctor ordered a colonoscopy immediately.
